designSystem.name: Event Site General Design System
designSystem.description: Comprehensive design system for event management application with admin and public-facing interfaces

designPrinciples.overview: The design system follows a modern, professional aesthetic with clear visual hierarchy, consistent spacing, and intuitive user interactions.
corePrinciples: Consistency: All UI components follow standardized patterns for spacing, colors, and typography
Accessibility: All interactive elements include proper ARIA labels, focus states, and keyboard navigation support
Responsiveness: Mobile-first approach with breakpoints at sm (640px), md (768px), lg (1024px), xl (1280px)
Visual Feedback: Hover effects, transitions, and state changes provide clear user feedback
Color Semantics: Colors are used semantically (blue for primary actions, green for success/view, red for destructive actions, etc.)
Professional Polish: Subtle shadows, rounded corners, and smooth transitions create a refined user experience

primary.description: Warm earth tone - primary brand color

success.usage: Success states, positive actions, enabled status

error.usage: Error states, destructive actions, validation errors

adminColorPalette.description: Vibrant color palette for admin interface buttons and actions
adminColorPalette.rule: NO TWO BUTTONS IN THE SAME BUTTON GROUP CAN HAVE THE SAME BACKGROUND COLOR. All gray colors (gray, slate, stone, zinc, neutral) are prohibited for button backgrounds.
adminColorPalette.usage: Each button in a button group must have a unique, vibrant color to ensure visual distinction

sacredSpacing.usage: Consistent vertical spacing between major sections

buttonGroups.description: Navigation button groups displayed in grid layout across admin pages

container.grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4

buttonCard.structure: Link component with flex column layout
buttonCard.className: flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-{color}-50 hover:bg-{color}-100 text-{color}-800 rounded-lg shadow-md p-4 text-xs transition-all group

iconContainer.className: flex-shrink-0 w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-{color}-100 flex items-center justify-center mb-3 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300

buttonCard.colorRule: Each button must have a unique color. No duplicates within the same button group. Gray colors are prohibited.

actionButtons.description: Full-width vertical action buttons with icons and text labels
actionButtons.structure: Link or button component with horizontal flex layout
actionButtons.className: w-full flex-shrink-0 h-14 rounded-xl bg-{color}-100 hover:bg-{color}-200 flex items-center justify-center gap-3 transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105

iconContainer.className: flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-{color}-200 flex items-center justify-center

colorSemantics.green: View, View Details, View Organization actions

tableActionButtons.description: Square icon-only buttons in admin tables
tableActionButtons.className: flex-shrink-0 w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-{color}-100 hover:bg-{color}-200 flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-110

mediumActionIcons.description: Medium-sized action icons in media gallery grids and similar contexts
mediumActionIcons.className: flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-{color}-100 hover:bg-{color}-200 flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-110
mediumActionIcons.iconType: Always use inline SVG icons, never react-icons or other icon libraries

toggleSwitches.description: Toggle switch components for filtering and state toggling

container.layout: Horizontal flex with labels on both sides

switch.className: relative inline-flex h-10 w-16 items-center rounded-full transition-all duration-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 hover:scale-105

thumb.className: inline-flex items-center justify-center h-8 w-8 transform rounded-full bg-white transition-transform duration-300 shadow-md

pagination.description: Pagination footer controls with Previous/Next buttons and page information

buttons.className: px-5 py-2.5 bg-blue-100 hover:bg-blue-200 text-blue-700 font-semibold rounded-lg shadow-sm border-2 border-blue-400 hover:border-blue-500 disabled:bg-blue-100 disabled:border-blue-300 disabled:text-blue-500 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2 transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-md

pageInfo.className: px-4 py-2 bg-blue-50 border-2 border-blue-300 rounded-lg shadow-sm

itemCount.className: inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 bg-blue-50 border-2 border-blue-300 rounded-lg shadow-sm

emptyState.className: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-orange-50 border-2 border-orange-300 rounded-lg shadow-sm

tabs.description: Tab navigation components for organizing content into sections

tabButton.className: py-3 px-4 border-b-2 font-semibold text-base flex items-center gap-3 rounded-t-lg transition-all duration-300

iconContainer.className: flex-shrink-0 w-14 h-14 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-110

floatingTabs.description: Alternative floating tab style (used in gallery)

activeTab.boxShadow: Multiple layered shadows with blue accent

formFields.description: Input fields, textareas, and select elements with consistent styling

input.base: mt-1 block w-full border rounded-xl focus:ring-blue-500 px-4 py-3 text-base

textarea.base: w-full border rounded-xl focus:ring-blue-500 px-4 py-3 text-base

select.base: w-full border rounded p-2 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-blue-500

errorSummary.className: bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg p-4 mb-4
errorSummary.title: text-sm font-medium text-red-800

validation.onBlur: Validate individual fields on blur for immediate feedback
validation.onChange: Clear errors when user starts typing
validation.onSubmit: Validate all fields before submission, scroll to first error

checkboxes.description: Custom checkbox styling with larger, more visible checkboxes

customCheckbox.className: custom-checkbox h-6 w-6 border-2 border-gray-400 rounded-lg cursor-pointer appearance-none relative bg-white

tick.className: custom-checkbox-tick absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none

customCheckbox.clickHandling: onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} to prevent event bubbling

label.className: mt-2 text-xs text-center select-none break-words max-w-[6rem]

cards.description: Card components for displaying content in containers

eventCard.background: Gradient backgrounds from color palette (blue-50 to blue-100, etc.)
eventCard.className: bg-gradient-to-br from-{color}-50 to-{color}-100 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl hover:shadow-3xl transition-all duration-300

icons.description: Icon system using inline SVG with Heroicons pattern

sizes.small: w-4 h-4 (16px × 16px) - Inline icons with text
sizes.medium: w-6 h-6 (24px × 24px) - Action buttons, medium actions
sizes.large: w-10 h-10 (40px × 40px) - Large feature icons, table actions

icons.rule: Always use inline SVG icons for Medium Action Icons. Never use react-icons or other icon libraries for these.

dialogButton.className: flex-1 flex-shrink-0 h-14 rounded-xl bg-{color}-100 hover:bg-{color}-200 flex items-center justify-center gap-3 transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105

colorSemantics.confirm: red for destructive (bg-red-100, text-red-700), green for positive (bg-green-100, text-green-700)

shadows.sacredShadow: Custom shadow utility for cards and elevated elements

standard.sm: shadow-sm - Small shadow for subtle depth
standard.lg: shadow-lg - Large shadow for prominent elements

scale.subtle: hover:scale-105 (5% increase) - Full-width buttons, dialog buttons
scale.moderate: hover:scale-110 (10% increase) - Icon buttons, table actions, button groups

hoverEffects.shadow: hover:shadow-md or hover:shadow-lg (enhanced shadow on hover)

accessibility.keyboardNavigation: All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible
accessibility.colorContrast: All text must meet WCAG AA contrast requirements

responsiveDesign.mobileFirst: Design for mobile first, then enhance for larger screens
responsiveDesign.gridResponsiveness: Always provide mobile fallback with grid-cols-1
responsiveDesign.spacingScaling: Responsive padding and margins (px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8)

error.display: Red borders, inline error messages, error summary box

empty.display: Orange info box with icon and message

gradients.radial: radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12), transparent 55%)
gradients.usage: Card backgrounds, media gallery containers, hero sections

overlays.description: Semi-transparent overlays for depth and visual hierarchy
overlays.opacity: opacity-30 to opacity-70 depending on context

usageGuidelines.buttonGroups: Use for navigation and dashboard-style interfaces. Each button must have unique color.
usageGuidelines.actionButtons: Use for primary actions in forms and detail pages. Full-width vertical layout.
usageGuidelines.tableActions: Use for row-level actions in data tables. Square icon-only buttons.
usageGuidelines.toggleSwitches: Use for binary state toggles and filtering. Always include labels on both sides.
usageGuidelines.pagination: Use for paginated lists. Always include Previous/Next, page info, and item count.
usageGuidelines.tabs: Use for organizing content into logical sections. Include icons for visual distinction.
usageGuidelines.formFields: Always include labels, error states, and validation feedback.
usageGuidelines.checkboxes: Use custom-checkbox class for larger, more visible checkboxes in forms.

doNot: Mix different button styles on the same page
Use duplicate colors within the same button group
Use gray colors for button backgrounds in admin interfaces
Use react-icons for Medium Action Icons (use inline SVG instead)
Omit hover effects on interactive elements
Skip error validation and feedback in forms
Use fixed heights that cause image cropping (use h-auto with object-contain)
Hardcode colors instead of using semantic color classes
